tree.name: Brooks Barnhizer
tree.tradeDescription: Drafted 44th overall by OKC using ATL's pick, acquired in Danilo Gallinari trade (Nov 24, 2020)

assetsGivenUp.name: Danilo Gallinari
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Clippers in PG trade. Traded to Atlanta (Nov 24, 2020) for 2025 2nd (Barnhizer).
assetsGivenUp.note: Italian forward, part of PG mega-trade haul from LAC

assetsGivenUp.name: Paul George
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Indiana for Oladipo and Sabonis. Traded to LAC (Jul 2019) for SGA, Gallinari, and picks.

assetsGivenUp.name: Victor Oladipo
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Orlando with Sabonis for Serge Ibaka

assetsGivenUp.name: Serge Ibaka
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 24th overall by Seattle using PHX pick. Full chain traces to Bobby Jackson (1997).
assetsGivenUp.note: See SGA/Jalen Williams chains for full Ibaka origin trace.
